title: heliciopsis velutina
intro: Heliciopsis velutina, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is commonly known as the "velvet heliciopsis". This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heliciopsis velutina include the treatment of fever, wounds, and various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance their effects.
